message:
feat(codegen): implement INTEGER PRIMARY KEY rowid routing in INSERT codegen

Wire IPK-aware rowid determination into codegen_insert_values and
codegen_insert_select: when an IPK alias column is present, emit IsNull
conditional branching to use the user-supplied value as the rowid (with
NewRowid fallback for NULL). Handle explicit column lists by remapping
the IPK index from schema position to VALUES position.

Add 5 codegen-level tests (IsNull/Copy routing, no-IPK NewRowid,
column-list reorder, IPK omission, multi-row) and 8 Connection-level
integration tests (NULL auto-gen, zero/negative rowids, multi-row,
mixed NULL+explicit, RETURNING *, roundtrip, delete+reinsert).

Addresses bd-3l6e / PARITY-B5.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
